name: lp-manager-bot
description: LP Manager Bot — OFF-CHAIN engine para Uniswap V3 (Arbitrum)

scripts.dev:mock: cross-env USE_MOCK=true MOCK_SCENARIO=sideways ts-node -r dotenv/config src/index.ts
scripts.dev:pump: cross-env USE_MOCK=true MOCK_SCENARIO=pump ts-node -r dotenv/config src/index.ts
scripts.dev:trend-up: cross-env USE_MOCK=true MOCK_SCENARIO=trending_up ts-node -r dotenv/config src/index.ts
scripts.dev:trend-down: cross-env USE_MOCK=true MOCK_SCENARIO=trending_down ts-node -r dotenv/config src/index.ts
scripts.dev:whipsaw: cross-env USE_MOCK=true MOCK_SCENARIO=whipsaw ts-node -r dotenv/config src/index.ts
scripts.dev:drift: cross-env USE_MOCK=true MOCK_SCENARIO=slow_drift ts-node -r dotenv/config src/index.ts
